description: New stocks-and-shares ISA subscription for the current tax year. Client subscribes directly to a Consilium-managed ISA wrapper. All required evidence must be present and compliant before the subscription is processed.

evidenceRequirements.description: Current risk profile must be on file and dated within the last 12 months.
Up-to-date fact find confirming client objectives, circumstances, and financial position.
Suitability report recommending the ISA subscription, dated within 90 days of submission.
Valid KYC identity verification and proof of address (HMRC requirement for ISA subscriptions).
Documented client investment objectives supporting the ISA strategy.
Signed fees and charges disclosure (COBS 6.1A) must be on file.
Key Features Illustration (KFI) or Key Information Document (KID) for the ISA wrapper.

optionalEvidence.description: Notes from the advice meeting at which the ISA subscription was recommended.
Standalone proof-of-address document where not captured within ID_VERIFICATION.
